result.reason: The 'ConnectionFilePath' setting, when retrieved from user settings, is not expanded with environment variables, causing dynamic path variables to not resolve when loading confCons.xml.
result.approach: Expand 'Properties.OptionsConnectionsPage.Default.ConnectionFilePath' using 'Environment.ExpandEnvironmentVariables' within the 'GetStartupConnectionFileName()' method before returning the path.
